---
title: "Validation of Deep Learning Derived Forest Inventory Predictions"
format:
  html:
    toc: True
---
## Relevant Resources

## Hyperparameter tuning

HPs we tuned:
- LR
- BS
- Num_points

SWEEP:


## Validating Deep Learning Predictions



## Examples of Evaluation Metrics and Plotting Figures



## How to use the pre-trained model

Pretrained models:
classification:
regression:
